text:
近接戦闘における支援役というのが
バウンサーなんだが、共闘しない限り
支援の特訓ができなくてな……

無論日々の特訓は欠かさないが
共闘となると、ひとりではできん。

実力的にもお前となら申し分ない。
今回は、基礎の見直しも兼ねて
火山洞窟へ行きたい。

ハード以上で行けば
物足りないということもないはずだ。
では

Bouncers support their allies while fighting at
close range, but without allies to support,
there is no way to practice appropriately.

Naturally, I adhere to my regular training
every day, but I cannot experience team battles
on my own.

I would have no objections pairing up with you,
considering your strength. I would like to go to
the Volcanic Caves to review the fundamentals.

Switching it to Hard or above should present
enough of a challenge. Let us be off.
